title: not only...but (also)...（倒裝）

formulas.formula: Not only + 助動詞 + S + V..., but (also) + S + V...
formulas.zh: 不僅...而且...（置句首需倒裝，前半句助動詞提前，後半句正常語序）

formulas.formula: Not only + 助動詞 + S + V + O..., but also + S + V + O...
formulas.zh: 不僅...而且...（連接兩個完整子句，表達雙重強調）

explanation: Not only置於句首時，主句需進行倒裝，將助動詞提至主詞前；but (also)部分則保持正常語序。此句型用於強調兩個同等重要的事實或觀點，常見於學術寫作與正式表達。注意not only與but also必須連接相同詞性或句法結構，動詞時態應與兩個主詞相符。易混淆點：倒裝只發生在not only部分，but also後不倒裝；避免將but or also混淆。

examples.eng: Not only does he speak English fluently, but also he masters Mandarin Chinese.
examples.chi: 他不僅英文說得流利，而且精通漢語。

examples.eng: Not only will the project save money, but it will also improve efficiency.
examples.chi: 這個計畫不僅會省錢，而且還會提高效率。

examples.eng: Not only are smartphones useful tools, but they also influence our daily behavior.
examples.chi: 智慧型手機不僅是有用的工具，而且還影響我們的日常行為。

examples.eng: Not only did Maria win the scholarship, but she also earned the teacher's award.
examples.chi: 瑪麗亞不僅獲得了獎學金，而且還贏得了教師獎。

extension.tip: 判斷倒裝的關鍵：not only置句首→主句倒裝；not only在句中→主句不倒裝。常見助動詞倒裝順序：do/does/did最常見，will/can次之，be動詞(am/is/are/was/were)亦需倒裝。注意but also後保持正常語序，勿重複倒裝。

examples.test: ✗ Not only he speaks English, but also he speaks Chinese.
examples.result: → ✓ Not only does he speak English, but also he speaks Chinese. （缺少倒裝）

examples.test: ✗ Not only does he speak English, but also does he speak Chinese.
examples.result: → ✓ Not only does he speak English, but also he speaks Chinese. （but also後過度倒裝）

examples.test: ✓ Not only is she talented, but she is also hardworking.
examples.result: → 正確。be動詞is倒裝至句首，but also後恢復正常語序。

extension.note: Not only句首必倒裝，but also後歸位——記住『前倒後正』原則。

parts: the book interesting, but also it teaches us valuable lessons.
exercises.sentence: Not only is the book interesting, but also it teaches us valuable lessons.
exercises.translation: 這本書不僅有趣，而且還教會我們寶貴的功課。

parts: she attend the conference, but she also presented her research.
exercises.sentence: Not only did she attend the conference, but she also presented her research.
exercises.translation: 她不僅參加了會議，而且還發表了她的研究。

parts: the students pass the exam, but they also achieved excellent grades.
exercises.sentence: Not only did the students pass the exam, but they also achieved excellent grades.
exercises.translation: 學生們不僅通過了考試，而且還獲得了優異成績。

parts: this smartphone affordable, but it also has advanced features.
exercises.sentence: Not only is this smartphone affordable, but it also has advanced features.
exercises.translation: 這支智慧型手機不僅價格親民，而且還具有先進功能。

vocab_table.zh: 並列強調兩個相同權重的事實
透過倒裝結構加強語氣和說服力

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的倒裝結構，完成Not only句型
mc_exercises.question_eng: Not only _______ he enjoy reading, but also he writes novels.
mc_exercises.explanation: Not only置於句首時，主句需倒裝，助動詞does須置於主詞he之前。B項重複主詞，破壞倒裝結構。C項時態與but also部分不符（he writes現在式）。D項be動詞無法表達enjoy的意義。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 判斷正確的but also部分語序和助動詞搭配
mc_exercises.question_eng: Not only will the government invest in education, but also _______ support local communities.
mc_exercises.explanation: but also後保持正常語序（主詞+動詞），不需倒裝。it will搭配will投資形成平行結構。A項錯誤倒裝於but also部分。C項時態與not only的will future不符。D項在but also後不應倒裝。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇符合平行結構的完整Not only...but also句型
mc_exercises.question_eng: Not only _______ she improve her grades, but also she gained confidence in herself.
mc_exercises.explanation: but also部分用過去式gained，故not only也應為過去式。助動詞did置於主詞she前完成倒裝。A項現在式與but also過去式時態不符。C項未倒裝。D項將時態改為未來式，與gained不符。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 複雜句型：辨別not only倒裝、but also正常語序及動詞時態
mc_exercises.question_eng: Not only _______ this policy reduce carbon emissions, but also it _______ create thousands of green jobs across the nation.
mc_exercises.explanation: both子句敘述未來效果，應使用will future體現並行時態。Not only + will(倒裝)...but also + will(正常語序)形成完整平行結構。A項時態不一致。B項但also後不應用does。C項does無法表達未來含義。
